allies.rationale_text: Falsifiability strengthens logical-fallacies detection by forcing claims to survive disconfirming evidence rather than rhetorical confidence.
allies.source_quote: the scientific method requires one to be able to test and disprove a theory

allies.rationale_text: First-principles-thinking strengthens logical-fallacies work by rebuilding the reasoning chain from facts instead of assumptions.
allies.source_quote: strips away these assumptions, leaving only a set of facts

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias drives logical fallacies by protecting the desired conclusion instead of the valid inference.
antagonists.source_quote: the team seeks only facts that confirm the initial hypothesis

structured_tensions.tension_text: Logical-fallacies conflicts with simplification when formal logical rigor rejects practical heuristics that are directionally correct under time pressure.
structured_tensions.source_quote: logical-fallacies conflicts with simplification (simplification) when formal logical rigor rejects practical heuristics that are directionally correct under time pressure.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Logical-fallacies conflicts with narratives when compelling narrative coherence is mistaken for logical soundness and fallacy detection is suspended.
structured_tensions.source_quote: logical-fallacies conflicts with narratives (narratives) when compelling narrative coherence is mistaken for logical soundness and fallacy detection is suspended.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
